indication: Dyspnea with absent right basilar breath sounds in known hepatic hydrothorax.
findings: Moderate-to-large RIGHT pleural effusion with associated compressive basilar atelectasis. No focal consolidation. No pneumothorax. Left lung clear. Cardiomediastinal silhouette normal; no pulmonary edema. Findings consistent with a transudative hepatic hydrothorax.
impression: Moderate-to-large right pleural effusion consistent with hepatic hydrothorax. No infiltrate or edema. Amenable to therapeutic thoracentesis.
comparison: Right effusion larger than on prior films.
